key.name: update-interval-seconds
key.description: Number of seconds between usage refreshes.

key.name: display-mode
key.description: Choose whether the extension shows remaining quota or consumed quota.

key.name: accounts-json
key.description: JSON-encoded list of configured Codex accounts.

key.name: visible-account-ids
key.description: Account IDs currently selected for display in the indicator and popup.
